title: Release Version Package Drift
description: Find new inconsistencies among package.json versions, workspace manifests, changelog, release docs, rc gate scripts, package README files, publish/release tooling, and current branch state. Skip duplicates already in issues.jsonl. Evidence must be file:line.

title: Generated Managed Artifact Drift
description: Find new drift between canonical templates/source and checked-in generated artifacts for .claude/.codex/.cursor, managed blocks, hook configs, skill copies, snapshots, and installer expectations. Skip duplicates already registered such as Cursor bootstrap stale, duplicate hook copies, archive-hint naming unless you find materially new evidence. Evidence must be file:line.

title: Tests Snapshots Runtime Drift
description: Find tests/snapshots that validate old behavior, omit current public surfaces, or contradict runtime implementation. Focus on snapshots, imports of retired modules, comments/assertions that make old behavior authoritative, and tests that falsely pass because they validate stale fixtures. Skip existing issues. Evidence must be file:line.

title: Config Schema Doc I18n Drift
description: Find new mismatches between fabric.config schema/defaults, config docs, i18n strings, CLI help/output, package docs, and runtime command behavior. Skip existing issues about serve strings, force-only flags, source naming, active_project unless materially new. Evidence must be file:line.

title: Knowledge Store Migration Tail Drift
description: Find new tail-end migration contradictions around .fabric/knowledge versus mounted stores, agents.meta derived state, event/metric ledgers, stable_id, pending/review/archive/import flows, docs, skill templates, and server tools. Skip existing issues about store-backed pending glob, counters docs, fab_recall-first lint unless materially new. Evidence must be file:line.
